title: Why Food Sensitivities Increase After 40 (Gut Health Explained)
tags: food sensitivities, gut health, leaky gut, microbiome, women over 40, digestion, inflammation
summary: Food sensitivities after 40 increase due to declining digestive enzyme output, intestinal permeability, hormonal changes, and microbiome shifts, all of which can be meaningfully addressed with targeted gut support.
featured_image_alt: Woman in her 40s preparing gut-healthy foods to address food sensitivities and digestive discomfort
